to be (location, temporary states, emotions, progressive)
to have (auxiliary; source of 'hay' - there is/are)
to say / tell (has irregular yo: digo)
to follow / continue (has irregular yo: sigo)

to know (a person, place, or be familiar with)

to mind / be bothersome (literally: to annoy)
